technical_decisions.title: PostgreSQL over MongoDB
technical_decisions.summary: Chose PostgreSQL for JSONB support, complex queries, Prisma integration, and ACID compliance

technical_decisions.title: Prisma as ORM
technical_decisions.summary: Selected Prisma for type-safe database access, automatic migrations, and connection pooling

technical_decisions.title: ChromaDB for Vector Storage
technical_decisions.summary: Adopted ChromaDB for native LlamaIndex integration, lightweight deployment, and metadata filtering

technical_decisions.title: Next.js App Router
technical_decisions.summary: Implemented Next.js App Router for server components, built-in API routes, and streaming support

technical_decisions.title: Tailwind CSS over CSS Modules
technical_decisions.summary: Chose Tailwind for rapid prototyping, consistent design system, and smaller bundle size

technical_decisions.title: OpenAI GPT-4 as Primary LLM
technical_decisions.summary: Selected GPT-4 for superior reasoning and context understanding with GPT-3.5-turbo fallback

technical_decisions.title: Streaming Responses
technical_decisions.summary: Enabled streaming for improved perceived performance and better UX in chat interface

technical_decisions.title: Server-Side Processing Only
technical_decisions.summary: Restricted processing to server-side for security, consistency, and performance

ui_rules.description: Every component must support RTL layout for Hebrew
Build forms with native HTML and React state only
